description: Link-only corpus of public, non-member-specific Humana and US government PDFs. Files are downloaded at runtime and are not redistributed.

rights_profiles.humana_public: Publicly accessible Humana material; link and quote with attribution. Humana copyright and site terms apply.
rights_profiles.us_government: Official US government publication; preserve agency attribution and verify current revisions before production use.

sources.title: Humana Provider Manual for Delegated Providers (2026)
sources.why_useful: Delegated-provider responsibilities, credentialing, utilization management, claims and compliance.

sources.title: Humana Provider Manual for Nondelegated Providers (2025)
sources.why_useful: Eligibility, referrals, authorizations, claims, appeals and quality requirements.

sources.why_useful: Kentucky Medicaid benefits, prior authorization, claims and provider requirements.

sources.title: Humana Healthy Horizons in Ohio Provider Manual (2025)
sources.why_useful: Ohio Medicaid services, claims, authorization, appeals and compliance.

sources.title: Humana HMO D-SNP Provider Billing Guide
sources.why_useful: Dual-eligible billing coordination, claim submission and payer-responsibility scenarios.

sources.why_useful: Dental eligibility, benefits, claims, predetermination and network administration.

sources.title: Humana Medicare Prior Authorization and Notification List (July 2026)
sources.why_useful: Current service-level Medicare authorization and notification requirements.

sources.title: Humana Part B Step Therapy Preferred Drug List (2026)
sources.why_useful: Part B step therapy, preferred products and exception-routing examples.

sources.title: Humana Prescriber Quick Reference Guide
sources.why_useful: Prescription processing, coverage determinations and prior authorization workflows.

sources.title: Humana Medicare Plan H5619-152-000 Evidence of Coverage (2026)
sources.why_useful: Plan-specific benefits, exclusions, costs, network, grievances and appeals.

sources.title: Humana Impact Report (2025)
sources.why_useful: Health equity, community, governance, sustainability and corporate strategy context.

sources.title: Humana Compliance Policy
sources.why_useful: Reporting, nonretaliation, investigation and corrective-action scenarios.

sources.title: Humana Privacy Policy
sources.why_useful: Privacy definitions, information handling, consumer choices and security practices.

sources.title: Humana Supplier Code of Conduct (2026)
sources.why_useful: Third-party ethics, privacy, security, accessibility and regulatory expectations.

sources.title: Medicare & You 2026
sources.why_useful: Medicare choices, benefits, rights, appeals, costs and enrollment.

sources.title: Medicare Claims Processing Manual, Chapter 1: General Billing Requirements
sources.why_useful: Authoritative claims submission, processing, payment and billing requirements.

sources.title: Medicare Benefit Policy Manual, Chapter 1: Inpatient Hospital Services
sources.why_useful: Authoritative Medicare inpatient coverage criteria and terminology.

sources.why_useful: Medicare Advantage grievance, determination and appeal concepts.

sources.why_useful: Five-level fee-for-service appeal flow, deadlines and documentation.

sources.why_useful: Compact authoritative sequence for Medicare Advantage appeal levels.
